command: echo '=== Check Xvfb ===' && ps aux | grep -E 'Xvfb|x11vnc' | grep -v grep && echo '=== Check display ===' && ls -la /tmp/.X11-unix/ 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Check watchdog scripts ===' && cat /root/PropFirmBot/scripts/watchdog.sh 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '=== Disable old crontab entries ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'PropFirmBot/scripts/watchdog\|Tradovate-Bot' | crontab - 2>&1 && echo '=== New crontab ===' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Start Xvfb if needed ===' && if ! pgrep -x Xvfb > /dev/null; then rm -f /tmp/.X99-lock /tmp/.X11-unix/X99 2>/dev/null; Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1280x1024x24 -ac +extension GLX +render -noreset & sleep 3; echo 'Xvfb started'; fi && echo '=== Start x11vnc ===' && if ! pgrep -x x11vnc > /dev/null; then x11vnc -display :99 -forever -shared -rfbport 5900 -bg -nopw -xkb 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo 'x11vnc started'; fi && echo '=== Now start MT5 ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine WINEDEBUG=-all STAGING_WRITECOPY=1 && cd '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && wine terminal64.exe &  WINEPID=$! && sleep 20 && echo '=== MT5 processes ===' && ps aux | grep -E 'terminal64|wine' | grep -v grep && echo '=== Terminal log ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -30 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi && echo '=== EA log ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$EALOG" ]; then echo "$EALOG"; tail -20 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi
